summary: SEO Health Performance Optimization Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (100%). All performance fixes verified: TTL caching working, store query fix (_id vs store_id) verified, aggregation pipelines for reviews/short_urls working, error handling returns graceful errors instead of 500s. Frontend: SEO Health page loads without blank screen, shows loading state while fetching, displays score circle with 5 factor breakdown and tips.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend caching: _score_cache with 5-min TTL (SCORE_CACHE_TTL=300) working correctly
Store query bug fixed: uses ObjectId(store_id) instead of store_id field
Aggregation pipelines: review_pipeline and link_pipeline replace find().to_list() for better performance
Error handling: Invalid user IDs return {'error': 'Invalid user ID'} instead of 500
Frontend error state: seo-health.tsx has error flag and retry button for failed API calls
Frontend loading state: Shows ActivityIndicator while loading=true, prevents blank screen
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Health Score performance optimization is complete. Backend has 5-min TTL in-memory cache, aggregation pipelines for reviews and short_urls, and graceful error handling. Frontend shows loading state while fetching and error/retry UI if API fails. Test user Forest Ward (69a0b7095fddcede09591667) has score=49 'Fair'. Team endpoint works with store_id 69a0b7095fddcede09591668 (5 team members).

backend.GET /api/seo/health-score/{user_id} - in: PASS - Returns {'error': 'Invalid user ID'} for undefined/null/short IDs
backend.GET /api/seo/health-score/{user_id} - ca: PASS - Second call uses cached data
backend.GET /api/seo/health-score/team/{store_id: PASS - Returns 5 team members sorted by score
backend.Score calculation: PASS - Total equals sum of 5 factors (capped at 100)
backend.Aggregation pipelines: PASS - Reviews and short_urls use $match/$group instead of find().to_list()

frontend.Home page SEO widget: PASS - Shows score 49, 'Fair', '5 tips to improve'
frontend.SEO Health page loading: PASS - Shows loading spinner while fetching (no blank screen)
frontend.SEO Health page content: PASS - Score circle, grade, 5 factor cards with progress bars visible
frontend.Error handling: PASS - Frontend has error state and retry button (verified in code)

performance_verification.store_query_fix: Changed from db.stores.find_one({'store_id': store_id}) to db.stores.find_one({'_id': ObjectId(store_id)})
